{{Quote|I'm not lost.|Suzy to [[Carlton Drake]]|Venom (film)}}
'''Suzy''' was a young girl who became a host of [[Riot]].

==Biography==
===Bonded with Riot===
At the [[San Francisco International Airport]], the [[Riot]] [[Symbiotes|symbiote]] had passed from a Malaysian woman to her. Afterwards, she made her way to the [[Life Foundation Headquarters]] and approached [[Carlton Drake]]. When Drake asked Suzy if she was lost, she replied that she was not before [[Riot]] transferred himself to Drake, leaving Suzy to die.<ref name="V">''[[Venom (film)|Venom]]''</ref>
